calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Dec-13-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. GLEN A. SMITH, Esq. of First Amended Coalition (Tel: 415-460-5060) for petitioner First Amendment Coalition;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: RESPONDENTS THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT AND LONDON BREED'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Respondents' "motion for judgment on the pleadings" is denied without prejudice. The pleadings include a request for attorney fees by petitioner First Amendment Coalition that has not been adjudicated. Petitioner shall file any motion for attorney fees on or before January 14, 2022.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Issuance Of Writ And Judgment Against The San Francisco Police Department Under The San Francisco Sunshine Ordinance
Off Calendar Jun-15-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Sherene Tagharobi, Esq, Glen Smith, Esq. (415) 460-5060, First Amendment Coalition, Petitioner First Amendment Coalition, A California Non-Profit Corproation
Tara Steely, Esq., Deputy City Attorneys, (415)-554-4674, for respondent, San Francisco Police Department
Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, Court reporter.

Court shares with counsel that that he is inclined to deny the request at this juncture, based on the threshold requirement the San Francisco Sunshine Ordinance has. Court address with counsel the issues of the Statute of Limitatations. Ms. Steely confirms with the Court that no statute of limitations has run.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

PETITIONER FIRST AMENDMENT COALITION'S Motion For Issuance Of Writ And Judgment Against The San Francisco Police Department Under The San Francisco Sunshine Ordinance is denied.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Issuance Of Writ And Judgment Against The San Francisco Police Department Under The San Francisco Sunshine Ordinance
Off Calendar Dec-09-2020 Off Calendar
